sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: State Street Group Ceases to Be Substantial Holder in Service Stream
feed.summary: State Street Corporation and its asset management subsidiaries are no longer substantial shareholders in Service Stream Limited as of March 24, 2026. Their combined interest in Service Stream's voting securities fell below the substantial holder threshold, potentially reducing large institutional ownership in the company. Service Stream Limited (AU:SSM) is an Australian company providing outsourced services primarily for utilities and telecommunications providers.

feed.title: FibroBiologics stock tumbles on reverse stock split plan By Investing.com
feed.summary: FibroBiologics Inc. (NASDAQ: FBLG) shares fell 22.2% in after-hours trading after announcing a 1-for-20 reverse stock split. The split, effective March 30, 2026, aims to help the company regain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement and attract broader investor interest. Stockholders had previously approved the reverse split on February 20, 2026.

feed.title: Church & Dwight's Arm & Hammer Toothpaste: Iconic Brand Driving Steady Consumer Demand in 2026
feed.summary: Church & Dwight's Arm & Hammer toothpaste continues to be a strong performer in the US oral care market, leveraging its baking soda technology for effective and value-driven dental hygiene. The brand holds a steady market share, with formulations focusing on whitening and sensitivity relief, appealing to middle-income, budget-conscious consumers. Its consistent sales and low marketing spend contribute significantly to Church & Dwight's financial stability, making it an attractive consumer staple for investors.

feed.title: AMD.SW Advanced Micro Devices SIX +490.21% intraday: Watch liquidity 26 Mar 2026
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD.SW) saw an intraday jump of 490.21% to CHF171.16, identified as a high-volume mover, though this surge was linked to a reported trade volume of only 4 shares, suggesting a data or block-trade event rather than broad liquidity. Traders are advised to verify the print's details and watch for volatile follow-through given the unusual volume. Meyka AI rates AMD.SW a `BUY` with a score of 70.45/100, but forecasts a significant downside of -78.05% to CHF37.62 within a year, indicating a conservative model projection and a need for caution.

feed.title: yoummday Wins a Texas Instruments 2025 Supplier Excellence Award
feed.summary: yoummday has announced it received the 2025 Texas Instruments Supplier Excellence Award, TI's highest level of supplier recognition. The award honors companies meeting TI's high standards for excellence in areas like cost, environmental responsibility, technology, and quality. yoummday was recognized for its excellent customer service, highlighting its collaboration with TI and its approach to customer experiences through human talent and innovative technology.

feed.title: Assessing Eversource Energy (ES) Valuation After Recent Short Term Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Eversource Energy (ES) has experienced a short-term share price decline of 7.8% over 7 days and 10.5% over 30 days, despite a 1-year total shareholder return of 17%. While analysts' narrative suggests ES is 11.1% undervalued with a fair value of $75.38, a different discounted cash flow (DCF) model estimates its value at $57.20, indicating the current price of $67.04 is above its cash flow value. Investors are encouraged to review the various valuation signals, risks, and rewards to determine if the stock presents a true reset or if future growth is already priced in.

feed.title: Is RTX (RTX) Fairly Priced After Recent Gains And Defense Sector Tailwinds
feed.summary: This article analyzes RTX's valuation using discounted cash flow (DCF) and price-to-earnings (P/E) ratios. The DCF model suggests RTX is slightly overvalued by about 6.7% at its current share price of US$195, while the P/E ratio indicates it is undervalued compared to its "Fair Ratio." The article also mentions the impact of the Aerospace & Defense sector and geopolitical risks on investor sentiment for RTX.

feed.title: Coca-Cola expands fairlife production in Michigan
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company is investing $650 million to expand its Fairlife facility in Coopersville, Michigan. This expansion will add two new processing lines, create approximately 150 jobs, and increase the site by 245,000 square feet, with operations expected by 2028. Additionally, the company plans to open a new Fairlife production facility in Webster, New York, later this year.

feed.title: Is Securities Class Action Over Due Diligence And Valuations Altering The Investment Case For Hercules Capital (HTGC)?
feed.summary: A securities class action lawsuit has been filed against Hercules Capital, alleging it misled investors regarding its due diligence practices, portfolio valuation, and classification of assets between May 2025 and February 2026. This lawsuit, along with an investigative report, scrutinizes the company's venture lending model, particularly its software-related debt, and challenges its growth-focused investment narrative. The allegations could necessitate a re-evaluation by investors, potentially shifting focus from growth to risk-adjusted analysis, despite strong financial results reported for Q4 and full year 2025.

feed.title: Abbott Laboratories stock faces pipeline scrutiny amid diagnostics slowdown in Q1 2026
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories is experiencing a slowdown in its core diagnostics segment, leading to investor scrutiny despite continued strong performance from its FreeStyle Libre diabetes care franchise and structural heart devices. The company's stock is testing key support levels as investor focus shifts from post-pandemic growth to sustainable organic drivers and the resilience of its established businesses like nutritionals. Challenges include moderating Libre growth in some markets, regulatory hurdles, and persistent diagnostics weakness, though the company's defensive profile and dividend history offer stability.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation Showcases Autonomous Industrial Operations at Hannover Messe 2026 | Corporate
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation will showcase its autonomous industrial operations at Hannover Messe 2026, focusing on how manufacturers can accelerate their journey from automation to autonomy using industrial AI, embedded intelligence, and secure architectures. The company will demonstrate practical applications, AI-enabled smart machines, and self-adjusting systems aimed at boosting productivity and improving quality. Rockwell's presentation will highlight its production-ready approach to industrial AI, supporting digital transformation and real-time optimization.

feed.title: Tractor Supply History: From Mail-Order to Retail Giant
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company began in 1938 as a mail-order tractor parts business founded by Charles E. Schmidt in Minot, North Dakota, addressing the need for accessible parts for farmers. It quickly expanded to retail stores and diversified its offerings beyond just parts to become a comprehensive agricultural and rural lifestyle retailer. The company's growth was further cemented when it went public in 1959, reaching $10 million in sales and solidifying its role as a crucial supplier to rural America.

feed.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Amazon.com, TJX Companies, Eaton, Blue Ridge and Security Federal
feed.summary: Zacks Equity Research highlights Amazon.com, TJX Companies, Eaton Corp. plc, Blue Ridge Bankshares, Inc., and Security Federal Corp. in its latest Analyst Blog. The article provides research reports for these companies, discussing their recent performance, competitive advantages, and potential challenges. Key factors like AI integration for Amazon, the resilient off-price model for TJX, and strong demand for Eaton are detailed, while Blue Ridge and Security Federal's market positions are also analyzed.

feed.title: Everest hires AXIS Re’s Jason Busti as Head of North America Treaty Reinsurance
feed.summary: Everest Group has appointed Jason Busti as its new Head of North America Treaty Reinsurance. Busti joins from AXIS Re, where he served as President of North America, and will be responsible for leading Everest's treaty reinsurance business across the US, Bermuda, and Canada. Jill Beggs, EVP and CEO of Reinsurance at Everest, highlighted Busti's deep understanding of the market and strong client relationships as key assets for the role.

feed.title: CoStar Data Show a Surge in Occupier Demand for Southbank East Offices
feed.summary: CoStar data reveals that Southbank East has reversed two years of demand losses, achieving positive absorption in Q4 2025 with over 200,000 sq ft in annual net absorption, its strongest quarterly performance in over a decade. Despite a rise in vacancy rates to a 12-year high of 11.5% at the beginning of 2025 due to new developments, occupier demand is increasing, especially for larger floorplates where vacancy is only 8.3%. New developments are also showing improved pre-let performance compared to Central London.

feed.title: F5 Elevates to Gold Membership in the Cloud Native Computing Foundation
feed.summary: F5 has upgraded to Gold Membership in the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF), strengthening its commitment to open source cloud-native innovation. This move enhances F5's collaboration on key projects like OpenTelemetry and Kubernetes Ingress, focusing on secure networking, application delivery, and AI-driven observability. F5 aims to empower organizations with tools for modern application infrastructures, including AI workloads on Kubernetes.

feed.title: Oracle (ORCL) price target lowered on revenue conversion concerns
feed.summary: This article provides a brief update on Oracle (ORCL), stating that its price target has been lowered due to concerns about revenue conversion. The full content of the article is not available in the provided text.
